subject: Fw: new furniture
body:
--- On Tue, 7/15/08, nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com> wrote:

From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: new furniture
To: "JE Jail" <jeevacation@gmail.com>
Date: Tuesday, July 15, 2008, 2:28 PM







We were thinking the light bed & the reclining sofa ( only the middle piece - cabinets are sold separately) with the wider (pictured dark) shelves and drawers in the same light wood. Only 1 will fit because of the slanted ceiling. The fabric for the sofa is on picture 9. 
Coffee/dining table and 2 chairs in the light wood finish as well. We already ordered the carpet .
body_html:
--- On Tue, 7/15/08, nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com> wrote:
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: new furniture
To: "JE Jail" <jeevacation@gmail.com>
Date: Tuesday, July 15, 2008, 2:28 PM

We were thinking the light bed & the reclining sofa ( only the middle piece - cabinets are sold separately) with the wider (pictured dark) shelves and drawers in the same light wood. Only 1 will fit because of the slanted ceiling. The fabric for the sofa is on picture 9.

Coffee/dining table and 2 chairs in the light wood finish as well. We already ordered the carpet .
